remarks: Large (816 sq ft) one bedroom unit on 2nd floor. California type closet in bedroom with louver doors. Hardwood floors. Hot water, cooking gas and parking included. Laundry in lower level of building, no need to go outside. Large foyer could be office or eating area. PLEASE NOTE: All new Andersen windows installed in unit August/2025. Complex is located opposite Ridgeway Shopping Center. Walk to bus line, Scalzi Park, tennis courts. A pet would be considered on an individual basis. Tenants have been in place for 8 years, unit will be completely painted and cleaned prior to new tenant move in. There is a $100 move in and move out fee. NO MOVING in or out on weekends per condo rules. Property address is also known as 138-2C Summer Street
